instance.inst-vars: %0 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "reg_a" , i8 , 2 ) ) %1 |-> TV ( !hw.inout < i8 > , hw.inout ( "reg_b" , i8 , 1 ) ) %2 |-> TV ( i8 , 2 ) %3 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 ) %4 |-> TV ( i8 , 3 ) %arg0 |-> TV ( i1 , 0 ) %arg1 |-> TV ( i8 , 1 ) %arg2 |-> TV ( i8 , 5 )

circt.result: ListItem ( ListItem ( #result ( res , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) ) ListItem ( ListItem ( #result ( res , TV ( i8 , 3 ) ) ) )

mlir.attr-alias: #loc1 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 1 : 33 ) #loc2 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 20 ) #loc3 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 32 ) #loc4 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 45 ) #loc5 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 7 : 59 ) #loc6 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 21 ) #loc7 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 32 ) #loc8 |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 15 : 44 ) #loc |-> loc ( "a.mlir" : 1 : 20 )
mlir.symbol-table: "Adder" |-> "hw.module" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OperationList ^bb0 ( %arg0 : i1 , %arg1 : i8 , %arg2 : i8 , .VarAndTypeList ) : %0 , .OpResults = "sv.reg" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { name |-> "reg_a" } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) %1 , .OpResults = "sv.reg" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { name |-> "reg_b" } : ( .Types ) -> ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) .OpResults = "sv.initial" ( .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( { .OpResults = "sv.force" ( %0 , %arg2 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OpResults = "sv.force" ( %1 , %arg1 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { .Map } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types ) %2 , .OpResults = "sv.read_inout" ( %0 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %3 , .OpResults = "sv.read_inout" ( %1 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( !hw.inout < i8 > , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) %4 , .OpResults = "comb.add" ( %2 , %3 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , i8 , .Types ) -> ( i8 , .Types ) .OpResults = "hw.output" ( %4 , .VarList ) [ .Successors ] ( .Regions ) { .Map } : ( i8 , .Types ) -> ( .Types ) .OperationList .BlockList } , .Regions ) { module_type |-> !hw.modty < input clk : i1 , input a : i8 , input b : i8 , output res : i8 , .ModulePortList > parameters |-> [ ] port_locs |-> [ #loc6 , #loc7 , #loc8 , #loc9 , .AttributeValueList ] sym_name |-> "Adder" } : ( .Types ) -> ( .Types )
